claim_boundary: This workplan prepares regulatory, certification, and procurement readiness scaffolding only. It does not claim certification, compliance, government approval, procurement approval, legal sufficiency, financial/tax approval, production monitoring, or truth validation.
core_goal: Create a documentation and evidence scaffold showing governance, controls, boundaries, auditability, prohibited uses, human review, data handling, claim safety, and professional-review status without claiming certification, compliance, government approval, or procurement approval.

likely_reference_categories.safe_position: Can map internal controls conceptually; not claiming certification or formal compliance.
Can prepare documentation categories; not claiming regulator approval.
Can prepare diligence packet index; lawyer/CPA/security review required before real submission.
Professional-readiness package exists; not a CPA audit or legal opinion.

phases.goal: Define scope, likely standards/regulatory reference categories, evidence categories, and prohibited claims.

phases.completion_note: Control evidence inventory completed across command center, claim gates, provenance, client delivery, professional readiness, forecast/negative-space, and analytical audit layers.
phases.goal: Inventory existing controls and evidence artifacts across command center, claim gates, provenance, client delivery, professional readiness, and audit layers.
Create governance-policy scaffolds for prohibited use, human review, data handling, retention, protected methods, and claim safety.
Create enterprise/procurement-facing diligence index with safe artifacts, required reviews, and non-disclosure defaults.
Create a gap analysis against likely certification/procurement expectations without claiming compliance.
Audit continuity, claim safety, export boundaries, and professional-review posture.

professional_review_boundary: Any actual certification, procurement submission, compliance representation, legal claim, contract term, or money movement requires appropriate professional review.
purpose: Prepare SpecShift for future regulator, certification body, insurer, enterprise procurement, or standards-based diligence requests.
safe_overall_claim: SpecShift is building documentation and evidence scaffolds to support future professional, procurement, certification, or regulatory diligence. It is not certified, regulator-approved, procurement-approved, or compliance-certified.
